title: Domain
description: Domain schema from Axway Amplify Platform API

orgs.description: Organizations associated to this Domain, their association state, and any associated Identity Providers.

enabled.description: Date the Identity Provider was enabled for users on the Domain.

associated.description: Date the Domain was confirmed as associated to the Identity Provider.

guid.description: `guid` of the Organization the Domain is associated to.

idp.description: Identifier of the Identity Provider associated to the Domain for the Organization.

status.description: Indicator of the Organizations confirmed association to the Domain.

verified.description: Date the Domain was verified as owned by the Organization.

provider_guid.description: GUID identifier of the owning Provider if the Domain is configured in context of consumers of a marketplace.
